getHarnessDesigns() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXProject
Deprecated.
Avoid using this method as this can load significant data into memory when there are many harness designs in a project thus causing performance and capacity issues. To load specific designs, use IXProject.getDesigns(Class, List)

getICDsByNameAndRevision(String, String) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.api.icd.IXICDProvider
Gets a collection of ICDs for which the ICD name equals the specified name and the ICD revision equals the specified revision.
ICD is uniquely determined by its 'name' and 'revision'.

Gets the collection of ICDs whose 'role' equals the specified role.
getIcon() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom.IXOperation.IXOperationType
Provides an icon which is displayed in the Operation Library and Operation Templates trees in the SBOM Pattern Builder dialog.
getIcon() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom.IXOperationUI
Operation provided icon: this icon will be displayed in the SBOM tree on node sub-assemblies which have been generated by this operation.
getID() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject
Get the ID of the object
getID() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.task.IXTaskAttachment
A unique ID is generated by the system for each attachment.
getIDCCavityNames() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXLibraryIDCConnector
Gets connector's IDC Cavity Names
getIdentifier() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.authentication.IXClientAuthenticationResponse
For the given username and password this is the transformed identifier returned by the plugin which will be passed as a username to the server side (Capital Manager) plugin of type IXLogin In case this returns null or empty it will cause a authentication failure

getLibraryDevice() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.api.icd.IXICD

getLibraryImportFileExtensionDescription() - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.library.IXLibraryImport

checks effectivity is selected in this project.

IXAbstractPin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api

Created by IntelliJ IDEA.

This interface represents an object that can be used to indicate activeness in the system.

IXAdditionalComponent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api

IXAllocateFunctionConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint.define

IXApplicationAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action
Marker Interface class for all Custom Application Actions.
IXApplicationContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin

IXApplicationContextListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Any plugin can implement this interface.
IXArc - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api

IXAssembly - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing Assembly object.

Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of conductors to a given hole

IXAssignSignalConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint.define

IXAttributeComparator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report

IXAttributes - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
This will maintain the strings for all the exposed attributes to have ease in programming plugins.
IXAttributeSetter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Interface for storing attribute/property changes to be applied to an object.
IXAttributesResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

IXAuthenticationResponse - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.authentication

IXAutoLink - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager
This interface is extended by IXIntegratorAutoLink and IXHarnessXCAutoLink Implement IXIntegratorAutoLink if customized auto link functionality is required in the Integrator Change Manager.

IXAvailability - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin

Created by IntelliJ IDEA.

IXBaseAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action
Parent interface for all custom actions in Design and Symbol tools.
IXBaseApplicationContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of objects that are common to the Design and Symbol applications.
IXBaseAuthenticationResponse - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.authentication
If pluggable authentication(authentication outside of Capital) is desired for the Capital applications then user should implement IXAuthenticationResponse (server side user authentication) or IXClientAuthenticationResponse (capital client side user authentication) which are derived from this interface.
IXBaseContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Provides data access to the object in the system for plugin use
IXBaseCurrentContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Interface that provides contextual information to custom actions/plugins that are common to design tools and capitalsymbol.
IXBaseGraphicObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for defining extents for graphic objects.
IXBaseLogin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.authentication
If pluggable authentication(authentication outside of Capital) is desired for the Capital applications then user should implement IXClientLogin for client side authentication and IXLogin for server side authentication.
IXBaseSymbol - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Common interface representing basic symbol details like graphical information and symbol library for all symbols.
IXBaseSymbolContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Provides data access to the object in the system for plugin use in Capital Symbol.
IXBaseSymbolLibrary<SYMBOL_TYPE extends IXBaseSymbol> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Common interface representing details of symbol/border library

Interface for representing the design blocks.

Interface for accessing the block pin to which the pin is associated to.

Interface representing border library
IXBorderSymbol - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing the border symbols.
IXBreakoutTape - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api

IXBridgePrePostProcessor - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager

Interface representing build list.

IXCavitySeal - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
This object holds detail about the cavity seal for a particular IXCavityDetail.

Each change recognized by the comparators are created as a changed object.

This interface is to be implemented if pluggable change policy selection is desired for the Capital applications.

IXConductorVariant - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api

IXConfiguration - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the options and child configurations of a configuration defined in Capital Project.
IXConfigurationListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harnessimport
Event listener provided by the framework that is used by a configurable signal name generator plugin to inform the framework about changes in the state of a configuration panel.

IXConnectivityObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api

This class holds a collection of IXCostResult objects for an IXSBOM container.
IXCostSpliceConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows custom calculation of "Cost of splice" during routing
IXCostWireConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows custom calculation of "Cost of wire per unit length" during routing
IXCountResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - the max number to be allowed where this constraint applies

IXDataExchange - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange
You need to implement this interface if the intent is to exchange the data from Capital to other systems.
IXDataExchangeRegistrar - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange
You need to implement this interface to register the ReportCreator and the DataExchange
IXDataExchangeRegistrarResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange
This interface should not be implemented.
IXDatum - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base interface for all datum interfaces
IXDesign - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing the Designs.
IXDesignChangeEvent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.event
This change event is notified when there is a change in current design.
IXDesignChangeEvent.DESIGN_CHANGE_TYPE - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api.event
This enumeration defines the types of change events that may occur to a design.
IXDesignChangeListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.event
This interface represents a design change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital design change events.
IXDesignComparisonContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
Design Compariosn context allows
1) Registration of user defined comparators and matchers
2)Definition of the colors to be used in diagram ouputs, for example in SVG diagrams to represent a change
3)Procure the design comparison factory, which in turn can be used for creation of some default implementations and the objects meant for holding the change, like IXChangedObject, IXChangeType and IXChangeDescription.
IXDesignComparisonFactory - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
Design Comparison factory is used for creation of the default svg builder, comparison builder, attribute comparator, properties comparator, connectivity comparator and object matcher.
IXDesignDataGenerator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
Interface for generating Design data.
IXDesignFolder - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
IXDesignLog - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
This interface gives access to the design logs.
IXDesignLogSeverityEnum - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin
The severity of the message that will be logged
IXDesignModificationEvent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.event
This change event is notified when there is a modification in current design.
IXDesignModificationListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.event
This interface represents a design modification listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital design modification events.
IXDesignTabPanel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.designtab
This allows a developer to provide a customisable component to analyse and view design data.
IXDevice - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the containing slot of a device.
IXDeviceConnector - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for typing of a device connector.
IXDevicePin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the device and mated connector pin of a pin on a device.
IXDeviceSymbol - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing device symbol.
IXDiagram - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing the Diagram of a design.
IXDiagramBaseInstance - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base Interface to represent all diagram object instances.
IXDiagramBaseObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base Interface to represent all diagram objects.
IXDiagramCompoundObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base Interface to represent objects on the diagram which contain other objects.
IXDiagramDataGenerator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
Interface for generating Diagram data.
IXDiagramInstance - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent all diagram object instances.
IXDiagramObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base Interface to represent all diagram objects.
IXDiagramPartition - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator
A functionally partitioned diagram is a diagram generated by CAVAI for the wiring information in an Integrator design applicable to a functional diagram in the functional designs associated with the Integrator design.
A diagram partition is a further partitioning of a functionally partitioned diagram.
This class determines the content of the diagram partition.
IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator
This class will be used by system to allow users to configure a partitioner plugin before diagram generation.
IXDiagramPartitioner - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator
This class is used by CAVAI during diagram generation to determine the diagarm partitions for each functional diagram.
IXDiagramPartitionerPlugin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator
This plugin will be used by CAVAI to determine the creation of partition diagrams for a functional diagram

Usage pattern 1 : A plugin with UI, that creates/modifies settings

1.

All custom filters will implement this interface.
IXFilterExpression - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.query
A query(IXQuery) can filter down data it fetches to those that satisfy boolean condition specified by IXFilterExpression.
IXFixture - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
 
IXFolder - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
IXFootprintConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - The custom constraint that can be used to assign a footprint from the Library that would actually define the mapping between the slot device’s pins to cavities of the slot’s connectors for given slot device and the slot.
IXFootprintResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - It will hold the mapping information between slot device pins and connectors on the slot.
IXFunction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.capture
This interface represents an implementation of a function.
IXFunctionalModuleAssignationConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific design or set of object should be assigned functional module codes.
IXFunctionalModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned functional module codes.
IXFunctionalModuleAssignationResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation of functional module codes
IXFunctionalModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned functional technical module codes.
IXFunctionalModuleCode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for getting information about a Functional Module Code.
IXFunctionBridgeProcessor - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager
Implement this Bridge Processor plugin interface to process functional design data during Bridge In or Bridge Out.
IXFunctionBuildListDRCheck - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If you need to implement a Custom DRC that works on Function Build Lists, you need to implement this interface.

Implement this interface if you need to implement a custom action that works on function designs.

Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Function design applications.
IXFunctionDesignReport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
If you need to create a custom report generation that works on function designs, you need to implement this interface.

Class grouping the input parameters needed for DXF conversion of a diagram.

IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext - Class in com.mentor.chs.api
Class grouping the input parameters needed for PDF conversion of a diagram.
IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins - Class in com.mentor.chs.api

IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPageSizeChoice - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api

IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPaperOrientationChoice - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api

Class which need to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram.
IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext - Class in com.mentor.chs.api
Class which needs to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram for a specific dimension.
IXGraphicConversions.XPrintContext - Class in com.mentor.chs.api
Class representing all input parameters for printing diagrams to file.
IXGraphicConversions.XPrintDerivativeSelection - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api

IXGraphicConversions.XPrintPDFContext - Class in com.mentor.chs.api
Class representing all input parameters for printing diagrams to PDF.
IXGraphicConversions.XPrintRevisionSelection - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api
Specifies the design revisions to be included when printing to file.
IXGraphicConversions.XPrintScope - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api

IXHarnessDiagramObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base Interface to represent all Harness diagram objects.
IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Deprecated.
This interface should not be used as there is no object of this type available or accessible in the system. Please use XGraphicsUnit instead.
IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit.IXHarnessPhysicalUnitType - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api
Deprecated.
X_MM means the unit is in "mm" X_CM means the unit is in "cm" X_INCH means the unit is in "inch" X_PIN means the unit is on Pin Grid.
IXHarnessDiagramRegion - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent a region in a harness diagram.
IXHarnessDRCheck - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If you need to implement a Custom DRC that works on HarnessXC designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXHarnessEngineering - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harness
Custom Harness Processing Engineering Task, gets executed by Capital in-place of the selected harness engineering processor.

IXHarnessLevel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the owning harness and options of a harness level.
IXHarnessPlugin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Harness design applications.
IXHarnessProcessingOutput - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harness
This object is used by custom Harness Processors to output messages to the design log.

IXLibraryExport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

IXLibraryExportOptions - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin<O extends IXLibraryObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library
Any library import modifier plugin should implement this interface and library import routine will call the plugin to get all the modifiers which needs to be applied during import process.

IXLibraryXMLExport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

IXLibraryXMLImport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

IXLogicDiagramPin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent Logic diagram Pin objects.
IXLogicDiagramPinList - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent Logic diagram PinList(any object which contains pins) objects.
IXLogicDiagramStackedPin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
 
IXLogicDRCheck - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If you need to implement a Custom DRC that works on Logic designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXLogicInspectionPanel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.designinspection
This interface identifies an IXDesignInspectionPanel that is intended to work on Logic designs.
IXLogicPlugin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Logic design applications.
IXLogicReport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Logic designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXLogicTable - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.table
This interface represents plug-in tables for Capital Logic.
IXLogin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.authentication
This interface is to be implemented if pluggable authentication(authentication outside of Capital) is desired for the Capital applications.This interface should be implemented if custom server side authentication is required.
IXMapToSameCavityBySignalConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint used for re-using a cavity by multiple pins with the same signal for device placement in a slot.
IXMarker - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to attributes on marker objects.
IXMaxCavitiesPerGroundConnectorConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the number of cavities in the connectors of ground slots
IXMaxGroundSignalsPerMultitermConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the number of signals to the cavities of ground slot connectors during automated ground combination.
IXMaxWiresPerMultitermConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of number of wires that can multiterm at a cavity
IXMaxWiresPerSpliceConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of number of wires that can be spliced in a given bundle
IXMessageReporter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
This interface allows a plugin to report a message to the User.
IXMessageReporterListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
The interface allows a plugin to access an implementation of IXMessageReporter.
IXMetricCalculationBoundary - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
This interface is used to notify IXMetricElement that metric calculation is about to start or has ended.
IXMetricElement - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
 
IXMetricResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
Interface representing the metric result.
IXMinSpliceDistanceConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of minimum distance between splices to other design objects during automatic splice placement
IXMinSpliceDistanceResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a return value for a constraint on an object type that is also specified.
IXMinSpliceDistanceResult.IXMinSpliceDistanceType - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
The type of harness object that the constraint applies to
IXMinSpliceSeparationConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of minimum distance between splices within a bundle or bundle region
IXModifier - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.modifier
All custom modifiers will implement this interface.
IXModuleAssignationConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific set of selected objects, or all objects in the current design should be assigned module codes as part of the Capital ModularXC assignation action.
IXModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned module codes as part of the Capital ModularXC assignation action.
IXModuleAssignationResult<XMC extends IXModuleCode> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation.
IXModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned technical module codes.
IXModuleCode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for getting information about a Module Code.
IXModuleCodeSetter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface allows module codes to be set on objects.
IXModuledDesign - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Those designs that can have module codes assigned to them will extend from this interface.
IXModuledObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Objects that have module codes implement this interface.
IXMulticore - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the shield, conductors, contained multicores, harness and harness levels of a multicore.
IXMulticoreAttributeConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a Muticore
IXMulticoreTakeoutConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of the maximum multicore takeout length constraint for a wire or shield signal during routing.
IXMultiLocationComponent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent a component that can exist at more than one location in a harness.
IXMultitermGroundDevicesConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the number of cavities in the connectors of ground slots during a "Combine All Grounds" action
IXMultitermSignalResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - for multi-terming device signals
IXNameInfo - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the name and description details of a name info.
IXNet - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for typing of a net object.
IXNetToWireConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - Used to exclude nets/multicores from conversion to wires in the corresponding Capital Logic action.
IXNetworkSpecificationConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of the Network Specification constraints for a top-level multicore or signal during routing.
IXNetworkSpecificationResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - Set the Network Specification for top-level multicores and signals where this constraint applies.
IXNetworkTerminationConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint used to allow cavities to be considered IxO terminated for specific signals/multicores
IXNode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the bundles, bundle regions, connector and splice related to a node.
IXNodeComponent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to model harness component which can be applied to a node.
IXNormalFolder - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
IXObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface allowing property and attribute access to objects.
IXObjectComparator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
Object comparators allow to specify the objects that are to be considered for change and to build the changes, additions and deletions.
IXObjectDataGenerator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
An interface for implementing custom links for a given design object while generating a package within Capital Publisher.
IXObjectFilter<O extends IXObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter
All custom object filters needs to implement this interface.
IXObjectMatcher - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
Object matcher indicates whether two objects (one from current and one from reference design) match each other in a comparison according to some criteria.
IXObjectModifierPlugin<O extends IXObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.modifier
All custom modifier plugins will implement from this interface.
IXObjectTypeInfo - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the name infos and property infos of an object type info defined in Capital Project.
IXOnlyDontResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
 
IXOnlyDontResult.OnlyDont - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - Set a Do/Dont directive when a constraint is active
IXOperation - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
Operation Plugin class used for integration with Capital Harness MPM SBOM generation.
IXOperation.IXOperationType - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
The operation type is mainly used for presentation and management of operations.
IXOperation.StandardOperationTypeEnum - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
Exposed standard operation types.
IXOperationParametersSerializer - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
This class represents the pluggable part of the operation which manages its own parameters and provides a serialized version of those for Capital to handle their persistence.
IXOperationUI - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
This class represents the pluggable part of the operation which provides a GUI for it.
IXOperationUI.IXParameterChangeListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
Interface to be called by the Parameters Editor when this operation's parameters have changed and/or when their values validity has changed.
IXOption - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for getting information about an option.
IXOptionExpressionParser - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface with methods to parse an option expression string into options.
IXOptionExpressionResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - a string representing a valid option expression in the current context
IXOptionExpressionValidator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface with methods to validate option expression and check if option expression is applicable for given set of options
IXOptionFolder - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for an option folder.
IXOptionPlacementConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control device placement in slots places device with option/variant expressions
IXOtherComponent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent an other component.
IXOutputPrinter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
This is used to print the output messages
IXOutputTabPanel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.output
This allows a developer to provide a customisable component to display in output window.
IXOutputWindow - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Allows custom plugins to display information to the output window.
IXOverbraid - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the terminations of an overbraid.
IXPackager - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
Generic interface to create a customized packager for publishing the data in Capital Publisher The infrastructure calls the generate method and the generation can generate the data for viewing by a particular viewer.
IXPackagerContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
An interface that represents the packager context when publishing the data in Capital Publisher.
IXPackagerSpecificGenerator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
Implement the interface in your generator classes to make them available to specific packagers.
IXPartitionerConfigurationSettings - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.wiringdesigngenerator
The result of an interactive creation/modification of partition plugin settings.
IXPathwayBreak - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.define
An implementation of a break in a pathway on a platform design.
IXPigtailUsageConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to indicate if a pigtail should be used for shield termination.
IXPin<OWNER extends IXPinList<?>> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base interface representing a generic pin owned by a pin list e.g.
IXPinList<PIN_TYPE extends IXPin<?>> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Base interface representing a generic pin list (e.g.
IXPinPlug - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
IXPlaceInlineHalfConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control logical inline half placement in topology inline halves
IXPlacementConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control device placement in slots
IXPlaceSpliceOnBundleConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control splice placement in bundles
IXPlatformArchitectureDesign - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.define
Interface representing a platform architecture design.
IXPlatformArchitectureDesignAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action.define
This interface will need to be implemented by any custom action that is to work on a platform architecture design
IXPlatformDRCheck - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If you need to implement a Custom DRC that works on Platform designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXPlatformFunction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.define
Represents a platform specific function that is allocated to a component on a platform design.
IXPlatformReport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Platform designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXPLMXMLTransformer - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange.teamcenter
You need to implement this interface if the intent is to exchange the data(Report) from Capital to Teamcenter.
IXPlugin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
This is the parent interface for all plug-in interfaces.
IXPolygon - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent all propertied graphic polygons (closed polylines).
IXPolyline - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent all propertied graphic polylines (including 2 point lines).
IXPostHarnessProcessor - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harness
Custom Harness Processing Engineering Task, gets executed by the tool after running any selected list of built-in engineering tasks.
IXPreHarnessProcessor - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harness
Custom Harness Processing Engineering Task, gets executed by the tool before running any selected list of built-in engineering tasks.
IXPrintServiceProvider - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Service provider interface for providing print service
IXPrintServices - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Class exposing print (to file) services.
IXProductionModuleAssignationConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific design or set of object should be assigned production module codes.
IXProductionModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned functional module codes.
IXProductionModuleAssignationResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation of production module code
IXProductionModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned production technical module codes.
IXProductionModuleCode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for getting information about a Production Module Code.
IXProject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing a project.
IXProjectChangeEvent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.event
This change event is notified when there is a change in current project.
IXProjectChangeListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.event
This interface represents a project change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital project change events.
IXProjectDataGenerator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
Interface for generating project level data.
IXPropertyFilter<O extends IXObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter
All custom property filters will implement this interface.
IXPropertyInfo - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the default value, ranges and other attributes of a property info.
IXPropertyInfoRange - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the start and end values of a property info range.
IXPropertySetter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Interface for storing property changes to be applied to an object.
IXProtectSignalWiringConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom constraint used to prevent modification of wiring by the following operations Abstract Wiring Synthesis Composite Wiring Synthesis (when both "Clear Promoted Options" and "Delete all Wiring, Harness Levels and Configurations" are unchecked) Generate Option Expressions Synthesize All Wiring Delete All Wiring Generate Center-Strip Splices Please note that other operation may modify the wiring.
IXProviderDataFactory - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.workbook.data
This factory is used to make the types of data that can be returned from an IXProvider.
IXQuery - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.query
IXQuery interface is used to fetch extensibility objects of a particular type by providing its name, its extensibility class and a filter condition (IXFilterExpression).
IXQueryExpressionFactory - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.query
interface to access and create expressions
IXQueryExpressionFactoryProvider - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Service provider interface for providing access to query expressions
IXQueryFactory - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.query
 
IXRectangle - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent all propertied graphic rectangles.
IXReferenceNode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent a reference node.
IXRefinedCavity - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the owner, mated device pin, mated connector cavity and generalized cavities of a refined connector pin.
IXRefinedConnector - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to retrieve the refined connector info
IXRelatedEntityDatum - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing related entity datums.
IXReport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
A report is defined by a collection of report modules( see IXReportModule).
IXReportContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
 
IXReportCreator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
This interface needs to be implemented for generating the custom report.
IXReportFactory - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
report factory is used to create a report and its allied objects (modules/templates) see IXReport,IXReportModule and IXReportTemplate.
IXReportModule - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
A report module clubs together collection of queries and result expressions.
IXReportProcessor - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.query
Report processors decide how entities queried for in reports are related to those returned by the scoping queries.
IXReportProcessorPlugin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.reporter
 
IXReportTemplate - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
A report template has a resultexpression which is a formula that decides the content(string) to be shown for entity types queried for in a report module.
IXResourceGenerator<T extends IXObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
Generic interface which can be implemented to create resource generators for classes that implement IXObject.
IXResourceGeneratorResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc
IXResourceGeneratorResult class allows a generator (e.g.
IXResultExpression - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.query
interface for result expression, used evaluating on objects to return strings or collections.
IXRingTerminal - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for mated device connector, owning harness, bundles connected to and nodes of a harness-side ring terminal.
IXRole - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.user
Class exposing typed holder for a Users Role.
IXRoutingConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of wires of a given signal
IXSBOM - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.sbom
This class represents an SBOM (Structured Bill Of Materials).
IXSBOMAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action
Implement this interface if you need to implement a Custom Action that works in the SBOM application
IXSBOMBaseContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
SBOM Context information passed by the engine to be used in plugin operations.
IXSBOMBaseContextListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
A supported plug-in implementing this interface can access appropriate IXSBOMBaseContext by storing in an instance variable the context passed in as a parameter to IXSBOMBaseContextListener.setSBOMBaseContext(IXSBOMBaseContext).
IXSBOMContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
SBOM Context information passed by the engine to be used in plugin operations.
IXSBOMContextFilterExpression - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.query
Interface for implementing SBOM Context Filter Expressions.
IXSBOMContextResultExpression - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.query
Interface for implementing a custom result expression for a particular SBOM container.
IXSBOMDRCheck - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If you need to implement a Custom DRC that works on SBOMs, you need to implement this interface.
IXSBOMEvaluationContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
The SBOM evaluation context represents information about state of the SBOM used by processes that evaluate one sub-assembly of the SBOM at a time, exposing the notion of a current sub-assembly.
IXSBOMHarnessUtilities - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom
SBOM utilities for interrogating the SBOM's harness design.
IXSBOMReport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on SBOMs, you need to implement this interface.
IXScenario - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
 
IXSchemGraphicsStyle - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.styles
Implement this if customized graphics color / line style / line thickness to be applied on the schematics in CAVAL / CAVAI / CSM.
IXScopeFilter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter
All custom Scope filters will implement this interface.
IXScopeSelector<o extends IXScopeFilter> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.scoping
Any Scope Plugin should implement this interface and Capital Applications will call the plugin to get scoping filters(IXScopeFilter) which needs to be applied to evaluate the scope of component.
IXSelectionChangeEvent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.event
This change event is notified when there is a change in selection set of an opened design.
IXSelectionChangeListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.event
This interface represents a selection change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital selection change events.
IXSeparationResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a return value for a constraint on an object type that is also specified.
IXSeparationResult.IXSeparationType - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Type of object to be given this constraint
IXSetAttributeConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - Used to set attributes and properties on objects that match the constraint.
IXShield - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the signal and harness levels of a shield.
IXSignal - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the splices, shields and wires of a signal.
IXSignalNameConfiguration - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harnessimport
Configuration part of a signal name generation plugin for imported harness wires.
IXSignalNameGenerator - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.harnessimport
Plugin that generates signal names for imported harness wires.
IXSingleEndedCoresConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of whether the wires or shields of signals in a multicore should be terminated when they do not connect to a conenctor
IXSlot - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing holes in a slot.
IXSlot.IXSlotTypeEnum - Enum in com.mentor.chs.api
 
IXSnapshot - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
Interface representing Snapshot.
IXSnapshotResults - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
Interface representing Snapshot results.
IXSplice - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to center strip wires, signal, harness, harness levels and nodes as well as a marker for whether or not the splice is itself center stripped.
IXSpliceAttributeConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a splice
IXSplicePin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the splice owning this splice pin.
IXSplicePositionBundleExclusionConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of automatically positioning splices on bundles
IXSplicePositionCostConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of "cost" weighting factor for a splice's wire conductors.
IXSpliceSymbol - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing splice symbol.
IXSpotTape - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
This interface represents a spot tape which is a kind of mechanical insulation which can be applied anywhere except a junction (breakout) node.
IXStoredGroup - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
Interface representing Architect group, which specifies subset of design objects.
IXStoredMetricElement - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
Interface representing metric element, use this to get characteristics of metric element i.e.
IXStructureNode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent a structure node.
IXStudy - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect
Interface representing study, a container in which multiple an entire physical architectural design exercise can take place
IXStyleableTable - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.table
Interface to represent a table plug-in which can be styled (columns) through table styling.
IXSubAssembly - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.sbom
This class represents a node in the SBOM assembly.
IXSubAssemblyNameConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - Used to name sub-assemblies in the SBOM
IXSubAssemblyPartNumberConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - Used to name sub-assembly part numbers in the SBOM
IXSubAssemblyWorkbookContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.workbook
This interface represents a context object that will be passed to providers during the generation of a workbook
IXSVGBuilder - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
Outputs the svg of the diagram after annotating the SVG with the colour indicated for change on the objects that have a change with respect to the comparators registered.
IXSymbol - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing basic symbol details like graphical information and symbol library for symbols including physical and comment symbols.
IXSymbolAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action
Implement this interface if you need to implement a Custom Action that works on Capital Symbol.
IXSymbolApplicationAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action
Marker Interface class for all Custom Application Actions in Capital Symbol.
IXSymbolContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of very useful objects in Symbol Application.
IXSymbolLibrary - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing symbol library
IXSymbolLibraryProvider - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Service provider interface for providing symbollibrary
IXSystemContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
IXSystemContext is the interface through which any custom task gets access to the general resources like project
IXTable - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.table
Interface to represent a table plug-in.
IXTableCommonData - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.table
Interface representing a table data model for tables driven via Capital Extensibility architecture.
IXTableData - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.workbook.data
Data object used to present a table in Capital Workbooks.
IXTableData - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.table
Interface representing a table data model for tables driven via Capital Extensibility architecture.
IXTableStyleData - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.table
Interface representing a table data model for tables driven via Capital Extensibility architecture.
IXTabPanel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
The base panel provider inteface to be used for Output window, inspection panal or design tab capabilities.
IXTask - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
This is the plugin interface for custom tasks.
IXTask.AbortStatus - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
 
IXTaskAttachment - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
IXTaskAttachment represents a data holder for task attachment and is used to access data attachment of the task.
IXTaskContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
IXTaskContext provides access to all the relevant information of a custom task under execution.
IXTaskHTMLLogger - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
This is used to log the output messages during the task execution.
IXTaskInputAttachment - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
IXTaskInputAttachment represents an existing attachment on the task.
IXTaskOutputAttachment - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
IXTaskOutputAttachment represents an existing attachment on the task.
IXTaskProgress - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.task
This is used to track progress of a task.
IXTeamcenterReportExchangeRegistrar - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange.teamcenter
You need to implement this interface to register the ReportCreator and the PLMXML Tranformer
IXTeamcenterReportExchangeRegistrarResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange.teamcenter
This interface should not be implemented.
IXTechnicalCombination<XMC extends IXModuleCode> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
This interface is used to describe the definition of a technical module code.
IXTerminal - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
This object holds detail about the terminal for a particular IXCavityDetail.
IXTerminateShieldToPigtailConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the positioning of pigtail wires of a given shield.
IXText - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface to represent all propertied graphic texts.
IXTextData - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.workbook.data
This data will be used with a print service instance to generate the workbook.
IXTopologyAction - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.action
Implement this interface if you need to implement a Custom Action that works on Topology designs
IXTopologyAutoLink - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager
Implement this if customized auto link functionality is required in the Topology Design Change Manager.
IXTopologyBridgeProcessor - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager
Implement this if bridge in process is required in a topology design.
IXTopologyDesign - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing Capital Topology Design.
IXTopologyDesignTabPanel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.designtab
This interface identifies an IXDesignTabPanel that is intended to work on Topology designs.
IXTopologyDRCheck - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If you need to implement a Custom DRC for Capital Topology designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXTopologyInspectionPanel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.designinspection
This interface identifies an IXDesignInspectionPanel that is intended to work on Topology designs.
IXTopologyMinSpliceSeparationConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint allows control of minimum distance between splices within a bundle in Capital Topology
IXTopologyPlugin - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin
Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Topology design applications.
IXTopologyReport - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.report
If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Topology designs, you need to implement this interface.
IXTopologyRoutingConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of conductors in Capital Topology
IXUser - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.user
Class exposing typed holder for a User.
IXUserAccessibilityEvaluation<O extends IXEvaluator> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.useraccess
This interface needs to be implemented for controlling access to an object based on conditions defined external to Capital.
IXUserAccessibilityEvaluator<O extends IXObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.useraccess
All custom user access filters needs to implement this interface.
IXUserAccessibilityResult<O extends IXObject> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.useraccess
Collection of these objects would be filled in by Capital and passed to IXUserAccessibilityEvaluator plugin.
IXUserSessionMgr - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
 
IXValidateable - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc
If any custom DRC check also implements this interface, then that DRC check will also be run when object model validation is done.
IXValidationReporter - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library
 
IXValidationReporter.Severity - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.library
 
IXValue - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the names and values of properties and attributes.
IXValueResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a String return value for a constraint on an object.
IXVariance - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the names and values of properties and attributes.
IXVariantFunctionalModuledDesign - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing variant functional moduled designs
IXVariantModuleCode - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for getting information about a Variant Module Code.
IXVariantProductionModuledDesign - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface representing variant production moduled designs
IXVariantReferenceNodePosition - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the variant positions defined on the reference nodes.
IXVariantSignal - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface for accessing the splices, shields, wires and option expression of a variant signal.
IXVariantWire - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Deprecated.
use IXConductorVariant instead
IXVehicleConfiguration - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the vehicle model and harness levels for a vehicle configuration defined in Capital Integrator.
IXVehicleModel - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the supported variants, options and included options for a vehicle model defined in Capital Integrator.
IXWindowChangeEvent - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.event
This change event is notified when there is a change in current diagram.
IXWindowChangeListener - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.event
This interface represents a window(diagram) change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital diagram change events.
IXWire - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface providing access to the center-strip splices, signal, harness and harness levels of this wire.
IXWireAttributeConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a wire
IXWireEnd - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface used to hold specific information relevant to a particular "end" of a Wire.
IXWireLengthResult - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint Return Object - holds a return value for Length Change attributes of a wire where this constraint applies.
IXWireLengthResult.IXLengthChangeType - Enum in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
 
IXWireRoutingConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of wires through a given bundle.
IXWireTerminalSpecConstraint - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint
Custom Constraint - used to set values of StartTerminalSpec and EndTerminalSpec
IXWiringDesignGeneratorContext - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.wiringdesigngenerator
Interface to access the contextual information about the CAVAI run.
IXWorkbookData - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.workbook.data
A data type that will represent information outputted from a provider This data will be used with a print service instance to generate the workbook
IXWorkbookDesignLog - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api.workbook
Use this interface to log messages during the generation of a workbook
IXWorkbookProvider<D extends IXWorkbookData> - Interface in com.mentor.chs.plugin.workbook.provider
Workbook Providers are used in Capital Workbooks as the data source.
IXWriteableObject - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface used by those objects that can have their properties/attributes changed.
IXZoneInfo - Interface in com.mentor.chs.api
Interface zone information on a diagram.

M

m_backgroundColor - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
This is used in the context of rendering a symbol as an image to indicate which background color to use.
m_CSVGParameters - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
This member variable allows the user to programtically specify some parameters to the non-Legacy (CSVG) mechanism without the need to modify chs_home\config\svgprops.xml.
m_displayPlaneSpliceGraphics - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
This setting is used in the context of Topology or Integrator diagram to indicate if the splice graphics should be displayed on the generated
m_dpi - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
 
m_excludeBorders - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
Parameters to specify whether to exclude borders, to hide pin graphics, fit to border
m_fitToBorder - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
 
m_generateLegacySVG - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
Where no dimension constraint (dpi, maxwidth, maxheight) is specified, the (pixel) dimensions of the output SVG are such that applying a 200 DPI conversion will result in the original Capital diagram physical dimensions.
m_height - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext
Parameters to specify the height and width of the PNG.
m_hidePinGraphics - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
 
m_imageHeight - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext

m_strokeStretch - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
 
m_strokeStretch - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
 
m_width - Variable in class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext

process(Collection<IXDiagram>) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.api.report.IXAutoViewDiagramProcessor

Process or modify the adaptor data that is bridged in/out.
process(IXHarnessDesign, IXHarnessProcessingOutput) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.harness.IXHarnessProcessor

processBridgeIn(Object, IXApplicationContext) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager.IXBridgeProcessor
Given an x2ml container instance, this method is called to allow any type of modification of this container so that these changes are considered during Bridge In
processBridgeOut(Object, IXApplicationContext) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager.IXBridgeProcessor
Given an x2ml container instance, this method is called to allow any type of modification of this container so that these changes are considered during Bridge Out

Reports a message found during plugin execution for the identified objects with a specified severity level.
report(IXObject, IXValidationReporter.Severity, String) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.library.IXValidationReporter
Custom validation needs to call this method to report issues during validation During component edit operation all validation issue (warning and error) are shown in validation dialog of component maintenance dialog In case of import if it is a warning message it will be logged in import log file and import will proceed but if it is an error message it will be logged in log file and import will abort

setIterationLoopingMode(boolean) - Method in interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom.IXSBOMContext
An operation can instruct the engine to continue to the next iteration even if it has not fired in the current iteration (otherwise, the engine will consider exhaustion has occured, will stop iterations for the current operation and engage the next operation).

Deprecated.
You will not be able to set physical thicknesses with this method. Please use IXGraphicsAttribute.setThickness(IXGraphicSize) method or IXGraphicsAttribute.setThickness(double, XGraphicsUnit) method instead.

This method will indicate to the system, if the settings specified in IXPartitionerConfigurationSettings.setSettings(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) should be persisted.
As a default, the settings will not be persited(if this method is not called in the implementation).
